Mystic Dragon
Titan ax

When attacking, has a 39-44% chance of dealing 150-165% splash damage.

Once in a while, the fighter turns 3 opponents to stone in a small area. They cannot move, take 20% more damage, and their ability cooldown is frozen. Lasts for 1,5 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
